headline: GPS Demands 35% Federal Cabinet Representation
context: Gabungan Parti Sarawak formally requested 12 of 34 federal cabinet positions in January 2026 citing Sarawak 31 parliamentary seats.

cards.big: GPS demands 12 of 34 cabinet seats for Sarawak representation
cards.sub: Current allocation of 5 ministerial posts called inadequate by GPS leadership

cards.big: Sarawak 31 MPs represent 14% of Parliament but hold only 8% of cabinet
cards.sub: Premier Abang Johari threatened to review coalition support before reshuffle

cards.big: Sabah GRS coalition separately demanded 8 cabinet posts for its 18 MPs
cards.sub: Combined Borneo bloc of 49 seats gives significant leverage in unity government

cards.big: Last cabinet reshuffle in 2024 added only 1 Sarawak minister to lineup
cards.sub: GPS sources say 3 key ministries including energy were specifically requested

cards.big: Cabinet composition reveals whether Borneo partnership is equal or token
GPS wants 35% cabinet seats. Representation without portfolio authority changes nothing structurally.
